creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

- first, thank you for porting Budgie to FreeBSD, it works great so far!

when i click on the "Sharing" settings tab then it crashes and will stuck there because it saved the last position where it got closed.

Its possible to unstuck the situation by opening the dconf-editor and return the value of the last settings panel from /org/buddiesofbudgie/control-center/last-panel/ to default.

Thank you in advance!
